function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0] -> Set[T1]) { forall(x1: Set[T0], x2: Set[T0]) { not x1 ⊂ x2 or x0(x1) ⊂ x0(x2) } = is_subset_monotone_map[T0, T1](x0) }[S, S](ring_hom_image_preimage_closure[S, T](f))
let w0: Set[S] satisfy { exists(k0: Set[S]) { w0 ⊂ k0 and not ring_hom_image_preimage_closure[S, T](f, w0) ⊂ ring_hom_image_preimage_closure[S, T](f, k0) } }
let w1: Set[S] satisfy { w0 ⊂ w1 and not ring_hom_image_preimage_closure[S, T](f, w0) ⊂ ring_hom_image_preimage_closure[S, T](f, w1) }
let w2: Set[S] satisfy { w0 ⊂ w2 and not ring_hom_image_preimage_closure[S, T](f, w0) ⊂ ring_hom_image_preimage_closure[S, T](f, w2) }
function(x0: Set[S], x1: Set[S]) { not x0 ⊂ x1 or ring_hom_image_preimage_closure[S, T](f, x0) ⊂ ring_hom_image_preimage_closure[S, T](f, x1) }(w0, w2)
